c.d: Maximum file size that can be sent via the app's free or standard plan
Whether the app provides encryption, end-to-end encryption, password protection, or secure key-based transfers
Availability and smooth operation across different operating systems like Android, iOS, Windows, and macOS
How user-friendly and straightforward the process is for sending files, including minimal setup or registration
Support for link expiration, traceability of downloads, collaboration boards, messaging, and multi-device connections
Restrictions on storage, ads presence, or required user registration for free plans
